summary: Removed PRIVATE_KEY env var from Deploy.s.sol. run() now calls vm.startBroadcast() without arguments; signing is delegated to Foundry CLI wallet management (--account, --ledger, --trezor). deploy() drops the deployerKey parameter and no longer manages broadcast context. Tests updated to call deploy() with 6 address args instead of 7. New SC-K49S scenario verifies compile-time absence of private key parameter.
